title: Retinted: Oh The Biomes We've Gone Waters
description: Retints Waters of Oh the Biomes Weve Gone biomes. (REQUIRES POLYTONE MOD) Part of the Retinted resource packs series.
body:
Recolors most of Oh the Biomes We've Gones' water to be a softer blue.
The default water colors are very blue, almost purple at times and hard on the eyes.
I think the deep blue suits the frozen biomes, but the rest of the biomes could use a lighter tint.
All Oh the Biomes weve gone biomes **except** non-mountain snowy biomes, swamp biomes and underground biomes have their water changed.

**Check out the Gallery for pictures.**

## _This Resource Pack Requires the Polytone mod to work!_
Polytone is a mod that allows resource pack creators to edit more things than usual, like water colors. I have also heard that Optifine works but I have not tested it.
